prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, landscape orientation
Primary request: Mutant: Year Zero / The Ark inspired world map for the terrain type dual_continent.
Scene/backdrop: two major post-apocalyptic continents separated by uneven contaminated seas and narrow straits, old-world ruin sites, Ark sanctuary regions, mutant clan territories, dead zones of radiation, collapsed metro corridors, scavenger trails, shattered megacity belts, poisoned wetlands, desertified farmlands and cold northern ruin fields.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated Zone atlas, weathered grey-green parchment, gritty ink and watercolor terrain relief, survival-sector map design, hazard icons, ruin markers, melancholic irradiated wasteland atmosphere.
Composition/framing: wide landscape world map, asymmetric landmasses of different sizes; the water separation is diagonal and S-shaped with L-shaped flooded channels, C-shaped gulfs and jagged straits, not a simple vertical split; include compass, torn map border, sector symbols and route lines without readable text.
Geography constraints: realistic complex coastlines with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, capes, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, flooded cities, inland seas, eroded industrial coasts and varied landforms; span multiple climates including tundra, mountain snowfields, temperate ruins, toxic forests, wetlands, deserts, crater zones and dead wasteland.
Avoid: mirrored continents, clean vertical divider, polished fantasy parchment, modern satellite view, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
